title: Verify state bypass on rerun for completed issues
description: Test that @kody rerun on a completed issue (issue #928 with kody:done label) bypasses state locks. Verification criteria: (1) pipeline re-executes without being blocked by 'already completed' message, (2) issue #928 remains usable for rerun. The discussion shows @kody rerun was commented and pipeline started at https://github.com/aharonyaircohen/Kody-Engine-Tester/actions/runs/24208680485.
existing_patterns: .github/workflows/kody.yml - rerun mode handler (line 250: CMD="rerun" when MODE="rerun")
